{% macro docs_sidebar(current_section) %}
{% set index_path = current_section ~ "/_index.md" | trim_start_matches(pat="/") %} {% set index = get_section(path=index_path) %} {% if index.subsections %} {% for s in index.subsections %} {% set subsection = get_section(path=s) %} {% if subsection.extra.sidebar_parts %} {% for part in subsection.extra.sidebar_parts %}

{{ part.title }}

    {% for page in subsection.pages %} {% if page.extra.part and page.extra.part == part.id %}
  • {{ page.title }}
    • {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endfor %} {% else %}

{{ subsection.title }}

  • Overview
    • {% for page in subsection.pages %}
  • {{ page.title }}
    • {% endfor %} {% for sub2 in subsection.subsections %} {% set sub2section = get_section(path=sub2) %} {% for page in sub2section.pages %}
  • {{ page.title }}
    • {% endfor %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endif %}
{% endmacro %}
